summary.title: Process pump history natively, avoid JSON round-trip
changes: Trio now reads pump history directly from storage instead of converting it to JSON first.
Unknown temp-basal subtypes are ignored (set to null) instead of causing a crash.
Fractional carb, fat, and protein values now preserve their expected decimal values.
The simulated bolus used for bolus-preview is still added, now represented as a native pump event.
